text:
(In reply to Steve Wills from comment #4)

I was at the time of submission, yes. Is there a discrepancy that you have seen?

In any case it might be worthwhile pulling this update as the project has just pushed out 0.20.1 to fix a couple of bugs. I'm not about for a week or so, so I think closing this might be the best solution.
